bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

user.description: Select the iDotMatrix panel to set up.

abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured iDotMatrix panels found. Make sure the panel is powered on, in range, and not connected to the vendor app.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Sends a raw iDotMatrix protocol command to the panel.

command.name: Command
command.description: The protocol command to build and send.

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Ordered list of integer arguments for the command (e.g. [1, 5, 0] for set_countdown mode/minutes/seconds).
